title: Spiderman Plushies!
description: This Mod adds Marvel Spiderman Plushies in the Game for Decoration!
body:
This mod adds **Marvel spiderman** plushies into minecraft and can be used for **decoration** in your minecraft world. It is **obtainable in survival**. it's very easy to craft.


There will be more spiderman plushies coming in the next updates!

Enjoy!
